text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after Tamamo Cross and I have finished
shopping...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Creek, Oguri, you two really turned up!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
All right, we got a farm to get to! Lead the way,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ I just can't wait to pet all the different
animals! ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Milk, cheese, yogurt... I bet there'll be all kinds of
tasty things to try.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Okay, Creek 'n Oguri are headin' to their stuff, so
let's get going too!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
How to felt a coaster out of wool. Now where's
the class... Oh, over there!
choice_data_list: Are you going to make one to send home?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Yep! I'm gonna make 'em a real nice—

text_block_list.name: Cows
text_block_list.text: Moooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caretaker
text_block_list.text: STOOOP! The stables are this waaaay!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
We gotta move fast! Those cows are chargin'
straight at Creek!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Aw, aren't you the sweetest little sheep? And I
bet you goats want some headpats too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Wait, you're da reason they're all comin' over?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Their poor caretaker's in a real panic, so let's send the livestock back where they're supposed to be.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Okay, all the animals are back where they belong... Now I can finally get back to makin' coasters...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hm? Oh, Tama and Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Did you want me to hang out with you? Sorry, but
I've got my hands full transporting this milk.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: And why exactly are you luggin' that around? Shouldn't the staff be doin' that?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Well, the ice cream here is just so delicious that I
went and ate their entire stock... before the other
customers could even get a scoop...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'm helping them out with the milk by way of an
apology. They can use this milk to make more ice
cream.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Guess that explains it! Well, lemme give ya a
hand! Four hands'll get the job done faster.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Time passes as we lug the milk barrels around
together, and the farm shutters for the day...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Tama... You were so busy helping me that
you missed out on making your coaster.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry too... Taking the animals back to their
pens must have taken you some time as well.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hey c'mon! It's all good! I had a load of fun, and I
got no regrets!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ('Sides...)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: Wowww! That shop's even bigger than our place!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Little Brother
text_block_list.text:
And there's so many of 'em! Tama, I wanna check
out that one!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hey now, don't run! If you wanna go someplace,
you gotta wait for your big sis!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Siblings
text_block_list.text: Okay! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
(Man, it feels like we walked a marathon! My
legs're stiff as a board here.)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
(Eh, but lookin' at those smiles, I feel like... it was
worth it.)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
It was a long, hectic day for sure, but we all had a
good time, right? 'Cause that's what matters!
choice_data_list: You'd better get some rest on the way home.
Let's do something like this again, all together.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I guess we're gonna be on this bus for a
while, huh.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Today was quite a workout. Y'know, I think... I
might be... spent...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh my. It looks like Tamtam's drifted right off to
sleep.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Zzz... Zzz... Th... anks...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking at Tamamo Cross's peaceful sleeping
face, I feel my heart warming.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Mountain-climbing, beach party—you
name it, I'm there. I'd have a blast goin' anywhere
with you guys!
choice_data_list: Let's go somewhere that you want to go, Tamamo.
Let's go somewhere that you want to go, Tamamo.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'm happy to chaperone anything you want,
Tamtam. Leave all the planning to mommy! ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
If Creek's going to be the mom, then... I'll be the
dad. Tama, say the word and Dad'll make it
happen.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Gaaah, not this again! You're as bad as da taiyaki
guy. I! AM NOT! A KID!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so our trip to the farm comes to an end on a
laid-back note.
